title: gh-126312: Don't traverse frozen objects on the free-threaded build
author: ZeroIntensity

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body: Apparently, the fix isn't as stable as I thought. Marking as draft temporarily.

comments.author: colesbury
comments.body: Please also fix `visit_freeze` to avoid marking objects with _PyGC_BITS_UNREACHABLE

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body:
> Please also fix `visit_freeze` to avoid marking objects with _PyGC_BITS_UNREACHABLE

Done. I'll see if I can come up with a quick test case. If not, it's probably fine to merge that untested, as it's such a small change.

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @ZeroIntensity for the PR, and @vstinner for merging it 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.13.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @ZeroIntensity and @vstinner, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.13` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker d4c72fed8cba8e15ab7bb6c30a92bc9f2c8f0a2c 3.13
```

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: @ZeroIntensity: Oh, the automated backport to 3.13 failed. Do you want to attempt to fix the cherry-pick conflict?

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-126866](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/126866) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.13 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.13).
